title: rubus collicola
intro: Rubus collicola, also known as the bush raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to Australia. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rubus collicola include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus collicola can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal properties.
